channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Andy Burnham To Outline Vision For UK With Focus On Raising Living Standards

media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham returned to Westminster earlier this month after winning a parliamentary seat

item.description: Andy Burnham will commit to a 10-year mission to raise living standards through reindustrialisation, housing, infrastructure and reform of utilities.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham will commit to a 10-year mission to raise living standards through reindustrialisation, housing, infrastructure and reform of utilities.

item.title: "Look Inwards": India Slams Pak Over "Baseless" Karachi Attack Claims

media:content.media:description: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal called the allegations baseless

item.description: Pakistan has carried out airstrikes on eastern Afghanistan overnight, targeting terrorists in response to the deadly attack, the Pakistani information minister said.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has carried out airstrikes on eastern Afghanistan overnight, targeting terrorists in response to the deadly attack, the Pakistani information minister said.

item.title: US, Iran Agree To Halt Fighting "For Now", To Discuss Hormuz Plan In Qatar

media:content.media:description: Tehran has not yet issued a statement, leaving speculation about its position.

item.description: The back-and-forth military actions over the weekend have tested the barely 11-day-old fragile initial US-Iran agreement that was supposed to halt hostilities during 60 days of negotiations.
item.content:encoded: The back-and-forth military actions over the weekend have tested the barely 11-day-old fragile initial US-Iran agreement that was supposed to halt hostilities during 60 days of negotiations.

item.title: 29 Dead As Pakistan Carries Out Ground Operation Along Afghanistan Border

media:content.media:description: Pakistan has witnessed a surge in militant attacks targeting police and security forces

item.description: The operation comes a day after militants armed with guns and explosives targeted the regional headquarters of the paramilitary Rangers in the southern port city of Karachi, killing three soldiers.
item.content:encoded: The operation comes a day after militants armed with guns and explosives targeted the regional headquarters of the paramilitary Rangers in the southern port city of Karachi, killing three soldiers.

item.title: 'Certain Shortage': Putin Flags Fuel Crunch After Ukraine Strikes

media:content.media:description: Russia annexed the territory from Ukraine in 2014, a move not recognised by many countries

item.description: Kyiv calls the attacks fair retribution for Russia's near-daily barrages on Ukrainian civilians and energy infrastructure since its February 2022 offensive.
item.content:encoded: Kyiv calls the attacks fair retribution for Russia's near-daily barrages on Ukrainian civilians and energy infrastructure since its February 2022 offensive.

item.title: Hope Fades In Venezuela As Death Count Nears 1,500 After Twin Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Rescue teams from the United States, Mexico and elsewhere scrambled to save people

item.description: Millions more people were feared to lack sanitation and other basic needs after one of Latin America's most devastating earthquake disasters.
item.content:encoded: Millions more people were feared to lack sanitation and other basic needs after one of Latin America's most devastating earthquake disasters.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: Death Count Nears 1,500 After Twin Earthquakes Devastate Venezuela

media:content.media:description: Earthquake in Venezuela Updates

item.description: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: Some 774 buildings were badly damaged in back-to-back quakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 that struck on Wednesday evening, including 189 buildings that have totally collapsed
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: Some 774 buildings were badly damaged in back-to-back quakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 that struck on Wednesday evening, including 189 buildings that have totally collapsed

item.title: "I Will Return To My Country This Year": Sheikh Hasina Exclusive

media:content.media:description: Sheikh Hasina remains unfazed despite facing a death penalty in her country

item.description: Any attack on the minorities is an attack on the independence of Bangladesh, stressed Sheikh Hasina in an interview with NDTV
item.content:encoded: Any attack on the minorities is an attack on the independence of Bangladesh, stressed Sheikh Hasina in an interview with NDTV

item.title: Qatari National Killed From Shrapnel Injuries Due To "Military Operation"

media:content.media:description: This happened after a vessel carrying him and another person went missing.

item.description: The ministry said the second individual was injured, adding that it located the missing vessel in the early hours of Sunday after search operations that started a day earlier.
item.content:encoded: The ministry said the second individual was injured, adding that it located the missing vessel in the early hours of Sunday after search operations that started a day earlier.

item.title: US-Iran War Highlights: US-Iran Exchange Strikes, Deal Under Pressure

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Highlights: US, Iran signed a 14-point deal to end the war on June 17

item.description: US-Iran War Highlights: The clashes brought new tension to the negotiating process meant to end a war launched by the United States and Israel at the end of February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Highlights: The clashes brought new tension to the negotiating process meant to end a war launched by the United States and Israel at the end of February.

item.title: Tehran-Dubai Flight Services To Resume Tomorrow, Says Iranian Media

media:content.media:description: Tickets were available on the website of Iranian airline Sepehran for Monday's 10:40 am flight to Dubai.

item.description: Dubai airport was repeatedly targeted by drones during the Middle East war, forcing it to suspend flights at times.
item.content:encoded: Dubai airport was repeatedly targeted by drones during the Middle East war, forcing it to suspend flights at times.

item.title: NASA's $30 Million Mission To Save Telescope From Falling Back To Earth

media:content.media:description: Swift has been sinking faster and faster because of recent intense solar activity.

item.description: The $30 million salvage operation gets underway as soon as this week with the planned launch of a robotic lifesaver.
item.content:encoded: The $30 million salvage operation gets underway as soon as this week with the planned launch of a robotic lifesaver.

item.title: '17 Years Of Silence': Baloch Activist's Open Letter Exposes Pak's Forced Disappearances

media:content.media:description: Baloch human rights activist Sammi Deen Baloch

item.description: For years, Baloch nationalist groups, families of missing persons and international rights organisations have alleged that enforced disappearances have become a recurring feature of Pakistan's counter-insurgency operations
item.content:encoded: For years, Baloch nationalist groups, families of missing persons and international rights organisations have alleged that enforced disappearances have become a recurring feature of Pakistan's counter-insurgency operations

item.title: Woman Gives Birth In Rubble After Venezuela Earthquake, Internet Calls It 'Miracle'

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: The quakes destroyed hundreds of buildings, including apartment blocks up to 15 stories tall, and shut down Venezuela's main international airport.
item.content:encoded: The quakes destroyed hundreds of buildings, including apartment blocks up to 15 stories tall, and shut down Venezuela's main international airport.

item.title: China's New AI Cybersecurity Tool On Par With Anthropic's Mythos

media:content.media:description: Security researchers say Zhipu AI can detect software security flaws and bugs.

item.description: Previewed in April, Mythos is designed to spot software vulnerabilities, yet experts warn it may enable stronger cyberattacks. This month, the US ordered Anthropic to stop exporting a less capable variant over national security concerns.
item.content:encoded: Previewed in April, Mythos is designed to spot software vulnerabilities, yet experts warn it may enable stronger cyberattacks. This month, the US ordered Anthropic to stop exporting a less capable variant over national security concerns.

item.title: 1,000 More Deaths In France's Worst Heatwave, Total Rises To Over 4,000

media:content.media:description: Europeans have been enduring blistering conditions during a heatwave.

item.description: Most of the fatalities involved older people and that it expected the mortality rate to rise as more information became available about deaths in residential care and homes.
item.content:encoded: Most of the fatalities involved older people and that it expected the mortality rate to rise as more information became available about deaths in residential care and homes.

item.title: The Hidden Story Behind Kim Jong Un's Mother And Her Secret Past

media:content.media:description: North Korea claims that the Kim family belongs to the sacred "Mount Paektu bloodline". (File)

item.description: North Korea claims that the Kim family belongs to the sacred "Mount Paektu bloodline" - a lineage portrayed as pure, heroic and destined to rule the country.
item.content:encoded: North Korea claims that the Kim family belongs to the sacred "Mount Paektu bloodline" - a lineage portrayed as pure, heroic and destined to rule the country.

item.title: 11 Killed In Small Aircraft Crash In Eastern France

media:content.media:description: French authorities said they were responding to an incident involving a civilian aircraft.

item.description: It was not immediately clear how many passengers and crew were in the flight.
item.content:encoded: It was not immediately clear how many passengers and crew were in the flight.

item.title: 14 Killed In Aramco Helicopter Crash In Saudi Arabia's Ras Tanura

media:content.media:description: The incident happened in Ras Tanura oil refinery.

item.description: The cause of the crash was unknown, the Saudi state news agency said.
item.content:encoded: The cause of the crash was unknown, the Saudi state news agency said.

item.title: Trump's Aide Left 'You're All That Matters To Me' Notes For Him, Reveals Book

media:content.media:description: The book claims Natalie Harp accompanied Trump almost everywhere.

item.description: , including on the golf course.
item.content:encoded: , including on the golf course.
